description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.13-alpine Docker image and defines the variables CGO_ENABLED='0', GO111MODULE='on' and PROJECT_PATH='/go/src/gitlab.com/zerok/container-inventory'. Add a single job named test that runs in the default test stage and executes the script commands: mkdir -p ${PROJECT_PATH}, cp -R * ${PROJECT_PATH}, and cd ${PROJECT_PATH} && go test ./... -cover. The job has no services, caches, artifacts, or rules and simply runs the Go tests with coverage.
